sections.paragraph:
fut. יֶעְשַׁן to smoke. (Arab. عَثَنَ id. In the Indo-Germanic languages, to this appear to correspond, Sansc. âtman, mind (prop. breath, spirit); Gr. ἀτμός, vapour, smoke, ἀτμή, ἀτμίς; Goth. athma, spirit; Germ. Athem, for vapour Brodem.) Exo 19:18. Metaph. used of the anger of God, Deu 29:19 Psa 74:1 80:5 .

עשן

m. adj. smoking, Exo 20:18.
